title: gelonium africanum
intro: Gelonium africanum, also known as African stinging nettle, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It is a perennial herb with stinging hairs that have been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The medicinal properties of Gelonium africanum include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of the plant include treating skin conditions, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the management of certain infections, and it is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion for consumption.
